title: Hydraax 16x
description: A clean texture pack for pvp/survival
body:
🎉Sorry for not updating the pack,an update is coming!🎉

**A Discord server will also be created for your suggestions!**

Hydraax 16 – Clean PvP Resource Pack

Optimized for combat, Hydraax 16 is a 16x16 texture pack that combines performance and clarity. Every texture is designed for PvP: clear blocks, sharp particles, and easily distinguishable elements during fights.

✨ Key Features:

16x16 resolution for stable FPS.

Clean and minimalist textures, perfect for competitive PvP.

Simplified particles and effects for better enemy visibility and fast-paced action.

Compatible with most Minecraft versions and PvP mods.

Dominate your duels with a pack that enhances visibility and makes every fight clearer and more responsive.

🧨 Functionalities:

Tiny swords

Powered snow highlight

No explosion particles

No nausea effect (requires disabling the default effect in Accessibility)

Ore outline

String highlight

Wool highlight

Netherite highlight

Bow loading animation

Smooth textures

And more!!

⚠️ Note: This is an overlay, not a full pack. This is the beta version.Please dont steal textures!
